Article.ArticleTitle: Study on the effect of solid particle proppant on fracture support and flow conductivity in coal seam.

Ma, G. et al. Simulation study on hydraulic fracturing of coal seam under true triaxial conditions[J]. Coal Mine Saf. 47 (11), 1–3 (2016).

Wang, G. et al. Influence of fracture connectivity and shape on water seepage of low-rank coal based on CT 3D reconstruction[J]. J. Nat. Gas Sci. Eng. 102, 104584 (2022).
Kang, X. et al. Application research on fracture propagation mechanism in Multi-Seam combined hydraulic fracturing[J]. J. Min. Saf. Eng. 38 (03), 602–608 (2021).
